amendmentAdoptionVoteBanner: An organization vote is in progress to adopt the amendment package. The canonical text is unchanged until the vote passes.
amendmentRequestCreated: संशोधन अनुरोध बनाया गया। सदस्यों के मत देने से पहले प्रतिनिधियों को मतदान स्वीकृत करना होगा। संगठन डैशबोर्ड में प्रगति देखें।
amendmentSummaryCounts: {{paragraph}} paragraph proposals, {{structure}} structure proposals, {{tree}} tree proposals pending
amendmentsClosedAdoptionVoteCreated: Amendments closed. An organization adoption vote has been created.
amendmentsOpenBanner: This document is open for amendments. You can propose changes in the Discussion tab.
cannotCreateStructureRejected: अस्वीकृत दस्तावेज़ों पर संरचना प्रस्ताव नहीं बनाए जा सकते
clickToCreateRelative: Click to create document relative to this one (right-click for menu)
closeAmendmentsConfirm: There are pending amendments. Closing will prevent new proposals and voting on these pending changes until amendments are reopened. Do you want to continue?
closeAmendmentsConfirmEmpty: No amendment candidates will be submitted for adoption. The document will lock immediately with no organization vote.
closeAmendmentsConfirmWithAdoptionVote: {{count}} amendment candidate(s) will be frozen and submitted to an organization adoption vote. Members can preview the bundle while the vote is open.
closeAmendmentsConfirmWithCount: There are {{count}} pending amendment proposal(s). Closing will prevent new proposals and voting on these pending changes until amendments are reopened. Do you want to continue?
createAtRoot: Create a new document at the root level

createDialog.orgDocumentBulletMembers: All active organization members will be included as collaborators
createDialog.orgDocumentBulletProposal: Document will be created in proposal status and require member voting for approval
createDialog.orgDocumentBulletSettings: Settings are determined by organization governance rules and cannot be customized
createDialog.orgDocumentDescription: This document will be owned by the entire organization and will use the governance rules established in the Governance tab. All document settings are automatically set from these rules and cannot be customized per document.
createDialog.positionChild: Creating document as a child of "{{title}}"
createDialog.positionRoot: Creating document at the root level

tooltips.acceptanceThreshold: Percentage of PRO votes required for proposals to be automatically accepted
tooltips.acceptanceThresholdDashboard: Percentage of collaborators who must vote PRO for a suggestion to be automatically accepted.
tooltips.documentOptions: These settings control how voting works. Defaults work great for most documents.
tooltips.structureProposalsDashboard: Allow collaborators to propose reorganizing document sections (moving, merging, deleting).
tooltips.structureProposalsOrg: Members can propose changes to document structure and organization
tooltips.voteFlexibilityChangeAllowed: Users can change their votes anytime
tooltips.voteFlexibilityDashboard: Flexible allows changing votes. Locked makes votes final after casting.
tooltips.voteFlexibilityLocked: Users cannot change votes after casting
tooltips.votingAnonymityAnonymous: Anonymous voting — only vote counts are visible
tooltips.votingAnonymityDashboard: Public voting shows who voted what. Anonymous voting hides voter identities.
tooltips.votingAnonymityPublic: Public voting — everyone can see who voted what

treeProposal.deleteWarningBody: This proposes deletion of this document. Deletion is blocked if the document still has child documents.
treeProposal.description: Propose a change to the document tree structure. The proposal will require voting approval from organization members.
treeProposal.noParentsAvailable: No other documents available as parent (excluding this document and its children)

operationDescriptions.default: Select an operation to propose a change to the document tree structure.
operationDescriptions.delete: Propose deletion of this document from the tree. This requires voting approval.
operationDescriptions.move: Move this document to a different parent in the tree structure.
operationDescriptions.reorder: Change the document sort order among siblings using a whole number between 0 and 10000.

treeProposal.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this change should be made...

reorderErrors.noOp: This document already has that order value.
reorderErrors.wholeNumber: Order must be a whole number.

treeProposal.reorderHint: Lower numbers appear first. Siblings in this branch: {{count}}. Current value: {{current}}.
